mapper.select: { CALL sonictmsdev_mssql..USP_ALRM_SEND_MNG_LISTBYALL ( #{cmpyCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dtType ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{fromDt ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{toDt ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{agntList ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{soList ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{soTypeList,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{soStatList,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rcptNm ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rcptTel ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{alrmSendYn,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) }

{ CALL sonictmsdev_mssql..USP_ALRM_SCDL_SAVE ( #{saveGubn ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tblAlrmScdlId ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cmpyCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{agntCd ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{alrmMsgType ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dtCalType ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dtCalDay ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sendTime ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{useYn ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{memo ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{saveUser ,mode=IN , jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) }
